description: §39.3 single-block rejection — the file declares two `<schema>` blocks (one for `users`, one for `posts`), both correctly placed as immediate children of `<program db="./app.db">`. §39.3: a file SHALL NOT contain more than one `<schema>` block. The gauntlet declaration check counts `<schema>` nodes per file and rejects the second (and each subsequent) block with E-SCHEMA-002. Resolution: merge the two table declarations into a single `<schema>`.
rationale: §39.12 error table + §39.3 normative statement: a file SHALL NOT contain more than one `<schema>` block. A second `<schema>` block in the same file SHALL be a compile error (E-SCHEMA-002). Both tables belong in one `<schema>` block.
